name: Jellyfish, Daikon and Chicken Breasty Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried jellyfish in a large bowl of cold water for 24 hours, changing the water a couple of times.
2. Peel and thinly slice the daikon radish. Stack the slices and cut into matchstick shreds. Add to a mixing bowl with 2 teaspoons of salt and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Drain the jellyfish and rinse under cold water. Pour boiling water over it for 15 seconds, then drain again.
4. Remove any bones from the chicken breast and slice thinly. Mix with egg white, cornstarch, and sesame oil; refrigerate for 30 minutes.
5. While marinating the chicken, wring out excess moisture from the daikon shreds. Add them to the bowl with the jellyfish.
6. In a saucepan, blend salt and sugar with dry sherry until dissolved. Heat peanut oil and add the seasoned wine, allowing it to sputter and evaporate. Add scallions when cool and stir well.
7. Toss the cooked chicken shreds into the salad bowl with the jellyfish and daikon mixture, then serve immediately.
